calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P.ias, Reporter: Diana Padilla. Plaintiff, Rina Kanubhai Patel was sworn and examined. The Court grants Decree changing petitioner's name to Reena Patel. Decree signed in open court.
